description: Level 1 tool use: single-step function calling. One tool (get_weather) is offered; a well-behaved model should call it with location='Paris' rather than answering from priors or asking a clarifying question. Deterministic: the checker inspects the recorded tool_calls (mock tools, no live API). FAIL = didn't call the tool, or called it with the wrong/absent location. Arg match is substring/case-insensitive, so 'Paris, France' still passes.
prompt: What's the weather in Paris right now? Use the tool you have available.

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather for a location.
